name: W T N M Atlantic
description_short: Federal credit union in Denver City, TX serving petroleum refining industry members with $1.9M in assets, checking/savings accounts, and loan products since 1952.
description_long:
W T N M Atlantic Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union established in 1952, making it over 70 years old. It is headquartered in Denver City, Texas, and operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). The credit union was founded to serve members with a primary common bond in the petroleum refining industry.

The credit union offers standard banking services including checking and savings accounts, ATM/Debit Card Programs, and various loan products. Based on their call report data, they provide unsecured loans, real estate-related loans, and other loan types to their membership. Their financial structure includes regular share accounts totaling $1.1M and other deposit products, with total assets of approximately $1.9M as of September 2025.

W T N M Atlantic distinguishes itself through its tight-knit membership focus on petroleum refining workers and its deep community roots in West Texas. Operating a single branch location with 466 members, it maintains a highly personalized, local banking experience. The institution is managed by CEO Joe English and Chairperson Kay Grandon, with direct contact available at (806) 592-9225.

As a very small credit union, W T N M Atlantic may have limited service capabilities compared to larger institutions. Members should verify that the credit union's specialized lending and deposit products match their individual financial needs, as the limited asset base and membership size mean fewer resources for product development or technology infrastructure.
pros: Federal credit union with NCUA insurance protection on member deposits
Established in 1952 with 74 years of community banking history in West Texas
Serves specific membership common bond (petroleum refining industry professionals)
Personalized service model with single branch and 466 members allowing direct relationships
Lower-cost alternative to commercial banks with member-focused governance structure
Offers ATM/Debit Card Programs for member convenience
Multiple loan product types available (unsecured, real estate, and other loans)
cons: Very small institution ($1.9M in assets) limits service scope, technology, and lending capacity
Single branch location in Denver City, TX restricts accessibility for members outside the immediate area
Restricted membership based on petroleum refining industry common bond may exclude many consumers
Limited public information available; no active website listed, only NCUSO directory presence
Minimal investment and capital reserves relative to loan portfolio may constrain growth
best_for: Petroleum refining industry employees in the Denver City, Texas area seeking personalized banking
Small business owners or contractors in petroleum refining with local community banking preferences
Long-term members seeking stable, member-owned financial institution with industry-specific focus
diagnosis: W T N M Atlantic Federal Credit Union is best suited for petroleum refining industry employees in the Denver City area who value personalized, community-based banking and member ownership. The primary limitation is its very small size ($1.9M assets, 466 members) and single-branch presence, making it inaccessible for most consumers outside its immediate geographic and occupational membership criteria.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
